title: About | Control Applications
content_html:
Control Applications

About us

Control Applications Ltd.

Control Applications (CA) is a private company that manufacture computerized control systems PLC/DDC & controllers, Building Automation systems (BMS), Electrical Power meters and Analysers, Power factor correction controllers, Automatic Transfer Switches (ATS) and more…

CA’s measurements and control systems consist of both hardware and software products that are user-friendly as well as being technically superior.

The products that stands at the centre or CA’s activities intended to measure monitor and control electrical networks' air conditioning systems as well as all the electromechanical systems that installed in public building.

The products intended for use in the industry, public buildings, hotels, hospitals, universities, shopping centres and more.  .

Control Applications Ltd. is the leading company in Israel. The high quality and efficiency of CA’s products recognized by their long list of satisfied customers all over the world.

CA’s measurements and control systems consist of both hardware and software products that are user-friendly as well as being technically superior. the products that stands at the center or CA’s activities is intended to measure ,monitor and control electrical networks as well as electromechanical systems. The products are intended for use in industry, public buildings, hotels, hospitals, universities, shopping centers and more.  .

Control Applications Ltd. is the leading company in Israel. The high quality and efficiency of CA’s products are recognized by their long list of satisfied customers all over the world .

Quality Assurance


We are committed to our goal to provide products of exceptional quality and the most efficient service. The Standards Institute of Israel, ISO 9001 and ISO 9000.3 recognize that Control Applications maintains a high level of quality in all areas of their activities including development, production, supplying and installation of the systems. In addition, the company’s equipment conforms to CE Directives and Standards.
